mapper.insert: insert into posts (title, content, user_id, tags, status) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{tags}, 1)
mapper.select: select id, title, content, tags from posts where status = 1 order by created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select id, title, content, tags, view_count, like_count, favorite_count, comment_count from posts where id = #{id} and status = 1
